<noinclude>
This is the "Study" form.
To create a page with this form, enter the PMID of the study publication; 
if a page with that name already exists, you will be sent to a form to edit that page.

{{#forminput:form=Study|placeholder=A valid PMID containing only integers is expected. Please omit leading zeroes.}}
'''Note''': If the PMID does not apply to this particular study, start the page name with the prefix <code>Study_</code> followed by the other available identifier.
</noinclude><includeonly>
<div id="wikiPreview" style="display: none; padding-bottom: 25px; margin-bottom: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid #AAAAAA;"></div>
{{{for template|Study}}}
Note: Most of the Study information is automatically included based on the PMID.
{| class="formtable"
! width="110" |study design: {{FieldTooltip|study design}}
| {{{field|study design|list|input type=tokens|property=study design|delimiter=;}}}
|}
== Citation ==
{|
! width="110" |Mode:
| {{{field|Mode|input type=radiobutton|values=Auto,Manual|mandatory|default=Auto|show on select=Manual=>cite_manual;}}}
|}
{| 
|- 
! width="110" |PMID: {{FieldTooltip|PMID}}
| <b>{{#if: {{#pos:{{#titleparts:{{FULLPAGENAME}}||-1}}|Study}}
       |N/A
       |{{#titleparts:{{FULLPAGENAME}}||-1}}
     }}</b>
|}
{|id="cite_manual"
! width="110" |Title:
| {{{field|Cite title|class=w-100}}}
|-
! Authors:
| {{{field|Cite authors|input type=tokens|values from property=Authors|list|delimiter=,}}}
|-
! Journal:
| {{{field|Cite journal|input type=tokens|values from property=Journal|max values=1}}}
|-
! Year
| {{{field|Cite year|input type=year|size=4|placeholder={{CURRENTYEAR}} }}}
|-
! Pages:
| {{{field|Cite pages|input type=year|size=4|placeholder=0}}}
|-
! First page:
|{{{field|Cite first page|input type=year|size=4|placeholder=0}}}
|-
! Keywords:
| {{{field|Cite keywords|input type=tokens|values from property=Keyword|list|delimiter=;}}}
|-
! Abstract:
| {{{field|Cite abstract|input type=textarea|rows=4|autogrow}}}
|}
{|
|-
! width="110" |DOI: {{FieldTooltip|DOI}}
| {{{field|DOI|size=60}}}
|-
! URI: {{FieldTooltip|URL}}
| {{{field|URI|size=60}}}
|-
|}
{{Form:State fields}}
{{{end template}}}

{{{standard input|save}}}
__NOTOC____NOEDITSECTION__</includeonly>
